title: Bunny Cottage
description: Hop over to ours for Easter! We have a bath gift with four bathtime treats for you. Help yourself to sweet fizzers and foamers that’ll put a spring in your step!

images.alt: Bunny Cottage. A house-shaped tin decorated with a bunny and yellow bricks. Arranged in front are four Easter-themed bath products, including three bath bombs and a bubble bar.

A "Bunny Cottage" Easter gift set is displayed on the edge of a white bathtub. It features a house-shaped gift box with bunny illustrations. In front of the box sit the four included Easter-themed bathing products, against green tiles.

A house-shaped "Bunny Cottage" Easter gift tin sits on the white edge of a bathtub. The colourful tin features illustrations of bunnies, Easter eggs, and chickens against a yellow brick background. All set against pale green bathroom tiles.

An aerial view image of a model's hand holding the "Big Dilemma" Lush Easter bath bomb above swirling orange bathwater. The egg-shaped bath bomb has the head of a cockerel on top, complete black eyes, an orange beak and red details.

An aerial view image of the "Golden Egg' Easter-themed bath bomb from Lush. The bath bomb is a perfect egg shape, covered in thick, sparkling, gold lustre. The product begins to dissolve, creating soft, yellow bathwater.

An aerial view image of the Lush "Munching Bunny" rabbit-shaped bath bomb, creating a swirl of pale purple foam. The bunny has a small orange carrot detail on its paws. The product dissolves, leaving a thick blanket of velvety lilac foam.

The image shows a close-up of a model's hand holding a bright pink "Baby Rainbow Carrot" bubble bar by its green paper stalks. The bubble bar is held under a stream of running water over a bathtub filled with thick white bubbles and pink water.
